allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Remove OC_Google_Map directory and update Claude settings

- Deleted OC_Google_Map/main.py (deprecated Google Maps automation script)
- Updated .claude/settings.local.json to allow rm -rf OC_Google_Map command

Generated By Matthew5043
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update Claude settings to allow git push

- Added Bash(git push origin master) to allowed commands in .claude/settings.local.json

Generated By Matthew5043
EOF
)")
